summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WaveWatch multiple fixes including movie/TV show detail page enhancements, anti-spoiler features, playlist improvements, and page limit removal. Most features working correctly with minor issues identified.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 but test expected different response format
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - functionality works but response format differs from test expectation

ui_bugs.issue: Budget/Revenue information not displayed for some movies

integration_issues.issue: Quick add playlist popup not appearing consistently

passed_tests: Movie detail page 'Disponible/A venir' badges working
Movie detail page language and country information displayed
TV show detail page status badges working (En cours/Terminee/Annulee/En production)
TV show detail page network, language, country information displayed
TV show detail page next episode information displayed
Movies page 500 page limit successfully removed (now shows 56,189 pages)
Frontend loading and navigation working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix notification subscription button visibility on TV show detail pages. 2) Investigate playlist popup modal not appearing consistently when clicking quick-add buttons. 3) Consider adding budget/revenue data validation for movies that don't have this information.
